creator: darcy@druid.net
text:
On Tue, 29 Aug 2006 13:17:48 -0300
Renato Botelho <garga@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> > I assumed that you had to be a FreeBSD committer.  I have no problem
> > putting my email address there.
> 
> Anybody can maintain a port, you need to be a committer just to
> apply changes on ports tree. Thanks to contributing.

OK, thanks.  Did you also see the generate package?  You can add me as
maintainer for that too.  The PR for that is ports/102507.
